name: Marbled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard boil the eggs for 10 minutes, then slightly crack the shells all around but do not remove the shell.
2. Boil the tea leaves in half a litre of water for 5 minutes.
3. Immerse the cracked eggs in the tea for 45 minutes or until cool. When you remove the shell where the cracks are, there will be a dark line and make them look as if they are made of marble.
